title: Double-click focus — camera pivots to clicked point
capture_instructions: Show a before/after or use a single screenshot of the result of double-clicking on a building rooftop in the Queens Campus point cloud. The camera should be centred on and zoomed toward that building. A circle or crosshair annotation marks the point that was double-clicked (the new pivot). The surrounding context (other buildings, roads) is visible at the edges. If possible, show a subtle animation trail or use an arrow pointing to the focus point.
ui_state: Grab/Navigate mode active, camera pivoted to a building in the Queens Campus after double-click

annotations.label: Double-click target — new camera pivot point
Double-click here to focus camera on this point
